top_signals.title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
top_signals.summary: The figure beat projections of 0.4% from Reuters-polled economists, and against the 0.3% in the last quarter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
